metadata.description: Personal Claude Code plugin marketplace by Raphjay2406

plugins.name: gen
plugins.description: Genorah v4.5.0 — Dashboard Drill-Down. The localhost:4455 cockpit is now interactive: click any section for a detail drawer (full per-failure check+detail, SUMMARY and PLAN via a lazy path-locked /api/section endpoint), open screenshots in a keyboard-navigable lightbox, and filter sections by verdict + name — atop the Awwwards-level, DNA-themed v4.4 redesign on the zero-dependency stack: it wears each project's Design DNA (palette + typography re-skin), with an instant-read stat band, a bento layout, tier-colored section verdicts (Verification Spine floor pass/fail + failing checks + advisory Ceiling), animated gate-failure hotspots, the 4-breakpoint screenshot grid, and count-up + entrance motion (all prefers-reduced-motion-gated). Presentation logic lives in a pure, unit-tested view-model the browser imports from the server. Deterministic companion renderer turns screen-specs into color-accurate clickable HTML cards with real DNA hex swatches, real fonts, colored mockups, and WCAG contrast badges. Four surfaces: creative directions, iterate proposals, archetype pick, palette/DNA. Per-option hero images via gpt-image with DNA-gradient fallback. Selection round-trip: clicks recorded to .events, read-selection.mjs resolves pick for next turn. 108-agent A2A-protocol pipeline (10 directors + 98 workers), 42 archetypes, 394-pt two-axis quality gate, 10 MCP integrations. From discovery to ship in measurably enforced quality.

plugins.name: wavy-bavy
plugins.description: Integrate the wavy-bavy library for seamless wave transitions between page sections
